summary: Launches a study section with a strong title, short framing copy, and visible learner outcomes.
renderingRules: Render a bold workbook section header on a bright card surface.
Show no more than three concise learner outcomes in the hero area.
Keep source support secondary to the authored lesson framing.
interactionRules: Do not require interaction to advance beyond the hero.
Allow the hero to open an optional support drawer when supportLabel is present.
persistenceRules: No persisted learner input is required for the hero itself.
constraints: The hero must not become a source dump.
The hero must stay above the first learn block.
